name: get_monthly_temperature_measures
description: Retrieve monthly temperature measurements for a home within a specified date range for temperature tracking and historical climate data analysis

end_date.description: The end date for the temperature data range (ISO 8601 format with timezone, e.g., 2026-03-01T00:00:00+01:00)

home_id.description: The unique identifier of the home for which to retrieve temperature measurements

start_date.description: The start date for the temperature data range (ISO 8601 format with timezone, e.g., 2026-02-01T00:00:00+01:00)
